title: Recover Rust gateway I/O bounds
description: Recover worst-case SLIP TX sizing and zero-progress TUN write failure; rewrite APRS-IS line reads to remain bounded before allocation.
acceptance_criteria: All-escaped SLIP packet fits; zero write cannot loop; 512-byte APRS line accepts and 513+/unterminated input remains bounded; tests/clippy and three reviews pass.
notes: Source recovery committed in 680e793e7 (bounded APRS-IS lines/session poisoning), fb7f8fa00 (worst-case SLIP TX sizing), and cdf32d6b5 (zero-progress TUN write failure). macOS gateway: 48 unit + 1 doc test pass; touched files rustfmt-clean; isolated strict Clippy passes; three final reviews clean. Full Clippy blocked by pre-existing lichen-schc warnings. Linux-only tun.rs/test not compiled locally and AWS auth remains expired, so keep open pending Linux validation. Positive partial TUN writes remain tracked by project-LICHEN-a0sx; APRS authorization/error semantics by project-LICHEN-3mns.
